S.FORM: I a miheca saka folad saka a romi'ad masofoc ci Baldwin Lonsdale , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Vanuatu anini i ci Baldwin Lonsdale, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 22 a romi'ad. kasofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ salikaka ŚÖĄŚľüŚßźŚ¶Ļ natayalan šļčŤĻü pitooran Śģóśēô
S.PHON: i a mińß…ô ¶a saka fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i b~b~va…ĺ…¨~…ģwin …ĺo~uns…¨~…ģa…ĺ…ô , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u b~vano~u~uato~u~u anini i ¶i b~b~va…ĺ…¨~…ģwin …ĺo~uns…¨~…ģa…ĺ…ô, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. kaso~ufo~u ¶an a …ĺo~uma ° **** …ĺa…ĺamo~u…¨~…ģ ** sa…ĺikaka **** nataja…ĺan ** pito~uo~uran **
S.FORM: I a miheca saka folad saka a romi'ad masofoc ci Baldwin Lonsdale , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Vanuatu anini i ci Baldwin Lonsdale, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 22 a romi'ad. kasofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ salikaka ŚÖĄŚľüŚßźŚ¶Ļ natayalan šļčŤĻü pitooran Śģóśēô
